computerspil fra 2009
videogioco del 2009

Set in the zombie apocalypse, Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2) is the highly anticipated sequel to the award-winning Left 4 Dead, the #1 co-op game of 2008.  This co-operative action horror FPS takes you and your friends through the cities, swamps and cemeteries of the Deep South, from Savannah to New Orleans across five expansive campaigns. 
 
 You'll play as one of four new survivors armed with a wide and devastating array of classic and upgraded weapons. In addition to firearms, you'll also get a chance to take out some aggression on infected with a variety of carnage-creating melee weapons, from chainsaws to axes and even the deadly frying pan. You'll be putting these weapons to the test against (or playing as in Versus) three horrific and formidable new Special Infected. You'll also encounter five new uncommon common infected, including the terrifying Mudmen.
 
 Helping to take L4D's frantic, action-packed gameplay to the next level is AI Director 2.0. This improved Director has the ability to procedurally change the weather you'll fight through and the pathways you'll take, in addition to tailoring the enemy population, effects, and sounds to match your performance. L4D2 promises a satisfying and uniquely challenging experience every time the game is played, custom-fitted to your style of play.
 
   Next generation co-op action gaming from the makers of Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress and Counter-Strike.
   Over 20 new weapons & items headlined by over 10 melee weapons – axe, chainsaw, frying pan, baseball bat – allow you to get up close with the zombies
   New survivors. New Story. New dialogue. 
   Five expansive campaigns for co-operative, Versus and Survival game modes.
   An all new multiplayer mode.
   Uncommon common infected. Each of the five new campaigns contains at least one new uncommon common zombies which are exclusive to that campaign. 
   AI Director 2.0: Advanced technology dubbed The AI Director drove L4D's unique gameplay – customizing enemy population, effects, and music, based upon the players’ performance. L4D 2 features The AI Director 2.0 which expands the Director’s ability to customize level layout, world objects, weather, and lighting to reflect different times of day.
   Stats, rankings, and awards system drives collaborative play

Ambientado en el apocalipsis zombi, Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2) es la esperadísima secuela del galardonado Left 4 Dead, el juego cooperativo número 1 de 2008. 
 Este FPS cooperativo de acción y terror os llevará a ti y a tus amigos por las ciudades, pantanos y cementerios del Sur Profundo, desde Savannah hasta Nueva Orleans, a lo largo de cinco extensas campañas.
 Jugarás como uno de los cuatro nuevos supervivientes, armado con un amplio y devastador arsenal de armas clásicas y mejoradas. Además de las armas de fuego, también tendrás la oportunidad de masacrar a los infectados con diversas armas de combate cuerpo a cuerpo, desde motosierras hasta hachas, e incluso una mortífera sartén.
 Pondrás a prueba estas armas contra tres espantosos y formidables nuevos infectados especiales (o jugarás como ellos en el modo Enfrentamiento). También te encontrarás con cinco nuevos infectados comunes no comunes, incluyendo a los aterradores embarrados.
 AI Director 2.0 lleva la jugabilidad frenética y repleta de acción de L4D a un nivel superior. Esta versión mejorada de Director tiene la capacidad de modificar por procedimientos la meteorología en la que luchas y las rutas que tomas, además de adaptar la población enemiga, los efectos y los sonidos para ajustarlos a tus acciones. L4D2 promete una experiencia satisfactoria, única y desafiante en cada partida, personalizada de acuerdo con tu estilo de juego.
   Acción cooperativa de nueva generación de la mano de los creadores de Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress y Counter-Strike.
   Más de 20 nuevas armas y objetos encabezados por más de 10 armas de combate cuerpo a cuerpo (hacha, motosierra, sartén, bate de béisbol...) te permitirán enfrentarte a los zombis desde bien cerca.
   Nuevos supervivientes. Nueva historia. Nuevos diálogos. 
   Cinco extensas campañas para los modos Cooperativo, Enfrentamiento y Supervivencia.
   Un modo multijugador completamente nuevo.
   Infectados comunes no comunes. Cada una de las cinco nuevas campañas contiene al menos un nuevo tipo de zombi común no común exclusivo de esa campaña. 
   AI Director 2.0: La avanzada tecnología bautizada como AI Director caracterizó la jugabilidad única de L4D permitiendo ajustar dinámicamente la población enemiga, los efectos y la música a las acciones de los jugadores. L4D2 incorpora el nuevo AI Director 2.0, que amplía la capacidad del Director para personalizar el diseño de los niveles, los objetos del entorno, la meteorología y la iluminación para reflejar los diferentes momentos del día.
   Un sistema de estadísticas, clasificaciones y premios que fomenta el juego cooperativo.

Situé dans un univers post-apocalyptique peuplé de zombies, Left 4 Dead 2 est la suite très attendue du meilleur jeu de coop de 2008. 
 Ce jeu de tir d'action et de coop à la première personne entraîne votre équipe dans les cimetières et marécages, de Savannah à La Nouvelle-Orléans en 5 campagnes.
 Vous incarnerez l'un des quatre survivants et vous disposerez d'un vaste arsenal d'armes de destruction classiques et améliorables. En plus des armes à feu, vous aurez également accès à des armes tranchantes et contondantes pour produire un maximum de dégâts en corps à corps : tronçonneuses, haches et la mortelle poêle à frire.
 Ces armes seront à mettre à l'épreuve (ou à utiliser en mode Versus) contre d'horribles adversaires comme les trois nouveaux infectés spéciaux. Vous rencontrerez également cinq nouveaux zombies communs singuliers, notamment les terribles Mudmen (Boueux).
 La jouabilité nerveuse orientée action du jeu est portée à un niveau supérieur par une nouvelle intelligence artificielle : AI Director 2.0. Cette nouvelle version de Director modifie procéduralement la météo de vos combats et les chemins que vous empruntez, et adapte le nombre de vos adversaires, les sons et les effets selon vos performances. L4D2 vous apportera une expérience unique et adaptée à votre style de jeu à chaque session.
   Jeu d'action et de coopération nouvelle génération par les créateurs de Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress et Counter-Strike.
   Avec plus de vingt armes et objets, dont au moins dix armes de corps à corps (hache, tronçonneuse, poêle à frire, batte de base-ball...), vous tiendrez les zombies en respect.
   Nouveaux survivants, nouvelle histoire, nouveaux dialogues. 
   Cinq nouvelles campagnes pour les modes coopératifs, survie et en opposition (Versus).
   Un tout nouveau mode multijoueur.
   Zombies communs singuliers. Chacune des cinq campagnes contient au moins un type de zombie commun singulier exclusif. 
   AI Director 2.0 : la technologie avancée d'AI Director avait façonné la jouabilité unique de L4D en personnalisant l'introduction des adversaires, les effets et la musique en fonction des performances du joueur ou de la joueuse. L4D2 utilise AI Director 2.0, qui étend les possibilités de personnalisation à la composition de l'environnement des cartes, aux objets du monde virtuel, à la météo, aux effets spéciaux et aux variations des éclairages en fonction de l'heure de la journée.
   Statistiques, classements et système de récompense pour le jeu coopératif.

Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2), das Zombieapokalypsenabenteuer schlechthin, ist die mit Spannung erwartete Fortsetzung des preisgekrönten Spiels Left 4 Dead, der Nr. 1 unter den Koop-Spielen von 2008. 
 In diesem kooperativen Action-Horror-FPS durchstreifen Sie mit Ihren Freunden Städte, Sümpfe und Friedhöfe der amerikanischen Südstaaten in fünf groß angelegten Kampagnen von Savannah bis New Orleans.
 Spielen Sie als einer der vier neuen Überlebenden, ausgerüstet mit einer großen und verheerenden Anzahl bekannter und verbesserter Waffen. Nicht, dass Sie im Kampf gegen die Infizierten auf Feuerwaffen beschränkt wären – Sie können sich darüber hinaus auch mit Kettensägen, Äxten und tödlichen Bratpfannen austoben!
 Testen Sie die durchschlagende Wirkung dieser Waffen an drei grauenerregenden und respekteinflößenden, speziellen Infizierten (oder spielen Sie im Versus-Modus). Außerdem gibt es unter den fünf neuen und ungewöhnlich gewöhnlichen Infizierten jetzt die Mudmen.
 AI Director 2.0. bringt das schnelllebige, actionreiche Gameplay von L4D auf das nächste Level. Dieser verbesserte Director verändert das Wetter und die Wege, die Sie einschlagen, prozedural und passt Gegner, Effekte und Geräusche an Ihre Leistung an. Jede Partie von L4D2 ist eine rundum befriedigende und einzigartig herausfordernde Erfahrung, die auf Ihren Spielstil zugeschnitten ist.
   Koop-Action der nächsten Generation von den Entwicklern von Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress und Counter-Strike.
   Über 20 neue Waffen und Gegenstände, gekrönt von mehr als 10 Nahkampfwaffen – rücken Sie den Zombies mit Äxten, Kettensägen, Bratpfannen und Baseballschlägern aus nächster Nähe zu Leibe!
   Neue Überlebende. Neue Geschichte. Neue Dialoge. 
   Fünf groß angelegte Kampagnen für Koop-, Versus- und Survival-Modus.
   Ein brandneuer Mehrspielermodus.
   Ungewöhnlich gewöhnliche Infizierte. Jede der neuen fünf Kampagnen beinhaltet mindestens einen neuen ungewöhnlich gewöhnlichen Zombie, exklusiv zu dieser Kampagne gehörend. 
   AI Director 2.0: Die hochentwickelte Technologie namens „The AI Director“ macht das einzigartige Gameplay von L4D möglich, indem sie Gegner, Effekte und musikalische Untermalung basierend auf der Leistung der Spieler verändert. Der AI Director 2.0 in L4D2 verfügt über erweiterte Möglichkeiten, das Layout von Levels sowie Objekte, Wetter und Beleuchtung in der Spielwelt an unterschiedliche Tageszeiten anzupassen.
   Statistiken, Ranglisten und ein Belohnungssystem fördern kooperatives Spielen.

Passado num apocalipse de zombies, Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2) é a sequela ansiosamente aguardada do galardoado Left 4 Dead, o jogo cooperativo n.º 1 de 2008. 
 Este jogo cooperativo de tiros na primeira pessoa de ação e terror vai levar-te a ti e aos teus amigos por cidades, pântanos e cemitérios do interior sul dos Estados Unidos, de Savannah a Nova Orleães, ao longo de cinco extensas campanhas.
 Vais jogar como um de quatro novos sobreviventes, armados com uma variedade devastadora de armas clássicas e melhoradas. Além de armas de fogo, também terás a oportunidade de descarregar alguma agressividade nos infectados com uma variedade de armas corpo a corpo, como motosserras, machados e até a mortífera frigideira.
 Poderás ver em primeira mão a letalidade destas armas contra três novos infectados especiais horripilantes e formidáveis (ou se jogares como um deles no modo Versus). Também irás encontrar cinco novos infectados comuns incomuns, como os aterradores "homens de lama".
 Para ajudarmos a levar a jogabilidade frenética e repleta de ação do L4D para o próximo nível, desenvolvemos o Realizador de I.A. 2.0 (AI Director 2.0). Este Realizador melhorado tem a capacidade de alterar de forma procedimental o clima e os caminhos do teu trajeto, para além de personalizar a população de inimigos, os efeitos e os sons para corresponderem ao teu desempenho. O L4D2 garante uma experiência satisfatória e distintamente desafiadora em cada partida, adaptando-se ao teu estilo de jogo.
   Jogo de ação cooperativa da próxima geração, dos criadores de Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress e Counter-Strike.
   Mais de 20 novas armas e itens, incluindo mais de 10 armas corpo a corpo (como machados, motosserras, frigideiras, bastões de basebol) que te permitem lidar de perto com os zombies.
   Novos sobreviventes. Nova história. Novos diálogos. 
   Mais de cinco extensas campanhas para os modos Campanha, Versus e Sobrevivência.
   Um modo multijogador inédito.
   Infectados comuns incomuns. Cada uma das cinco novas campanhas conta com pelo menos um novo zombie comum incomum exclusivo. 
   Realizador de I.A. 2.0: uma tecnologia avançada conhecida como Realizador de I.A. (AI Director) foi responsável pela jogabilidade única do L4D, personalizando a população de inimigos, efeitos e música com base no desempenho dos jogadores. O L4D2 traz consigo o melhorado Realizador de I.A. 2.0, que expande a capacidade do Realizador de personalizar a disposição dos níveis, os mundo, o clima e até a iluminação do mundo, de modo a corresponder a diferentes alturas do dia.
   Um sistema de estatísticas, classificações e reconhecimentos estimula a cooperação.

Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2) foregår i en zombie-apokalyptisk verden og er den længe ventede efterfølger til det prisvindende co-op-spil Left 4 Dead fra 2008. 
 Dette actionprægede FPS-gyserspil tager dig og dine venner gennem byer, sumper og kirkegårde i USA's sydstater i fem store kampagner.
 Du spiller som en af fire overlevende, der er bevæbnet med et bredt og altødelæggende arsenal af klassiske og opgraderede våben. Ud over at gå amok med skydevåben kan du også bruge alle mulige nærkampsvåben lige fra motorsave til økser til at give dine aggressioner frit løb og nedslagte inficerede zombier – der er endda en dødbringende stegepande.
 Våbnene bliver sat på prøve mod tre nye rædselsfulde og frygtindgydende specielle inficerede – eller du kan spille som en af dem i "Hold mod hold". Der er også fem nye ualmindelig almindelige inficerede, inklusive de rædselsfulde muddermænd.
 AI-manager 2.0 hjælper med til at tage L4D's vilde, actionpakkede gameplay til nye højder. Denne forbedrede manager kan ændre vejret, du kæmper i, eller de veje, du tager, og kan derudover tilpasse mængden af fjender, effekter og lyde, så det alt sammen passer til din præstation. L4D2 byder på en tilfredsstillende, unik og udfordrende oplevelse, som passer til din spillestil, hver gang du spiller.
   Næste generations co-op-actionspil fra skaberne af Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress og Counter-Strike.
   Over 20 nye våben og genstande med over 10 nærkampsvåben – økse, motorsav, stegepande, baseballkølle – der gør det muligt at komme helt tæt på zombierne.
   Nye overlevende. Ny historie. Ny dialog. 
   Fem omfattende kampagner til co-op og spiltilstandene "Hold mod hold" og "Overlevelse for hold".
   En helt ny multiplayertilstand.
   Ualmindelig almindelige inficerede. Hver af de fem nye kampagner har mindst én ualmindelig almindelig zombie, som er eksklusiv til den pågældende kampagne. 
   AI-manager 2.0: En avanceret teknologi kaldet AI-manager drev L4D's unikke gameplay ved at tilpasse mængden af fjender, effekter og musik baseret på spillerens præstation. L4D 2 kommer med AI-manager 2.0, som udvider managerens evne til at tilpasse banens layout, objekter i verden, vejret og belysningen for at afspejle forskellige tidspunkter på dagen.
   Samarbejde i spillet drives af statistikker, ranglister og et præmiesystem.

Ambientato durante l'apocalisse dei morti viventi, Left 4 Dead 2 (L4D2) è l'attesissimo sequel di Left 4 Dead, il gioco co-op numero 1 del 2008.
 Questo sparatutto in prima persona d'azione horror è un gioco co-op che porterà te e i tuoi amici tra le città, paludi e cimiteri del profondo sud degli Stati Uniti, da Savannah a New Orleans, attraverso cinque ampie campagne.
 Vestirai i panni di uno di quattro nuovi Sopravvissuti, armato di un vasto e devastante arsenale di armi classiche e migliorate. Oltre che con le armi da fuoco, avrai la possibilità di farla pagare agli Infetti con una varietà di sanguinose armi da mischia, dalle motoseghe alle asce, passando per la letale padella.
 Metterai alla prova queste armi contro tre potenti, orripilanti nuovi Infetti speciali (oppure ne dovrai evitare i colpi nella modalità Avversari). Te la vedrai anche con cinque nuovi Infetti comuni non comuni, tra cui gli spaventosi uomini di fango.
 Ad aiutare il gameplay frenetico e ricco d'azione di L4D a fare un ulteriore salto di qualità ci pensa l'IA Director 2.0. Questa versione migliorata del Director è in grado di modificare in maniera procedurale il meteo durante le tue battaglie e i percorsi che seguirai, oltre a regolare il numero e tipo di nemici, gli effetti e i suoni in base alle tue prestazioni. L4D2 promette un'esperienza soddisfacente e con sfide uniche ogni volta che si gioca, su misura per il tuo stile di gioco.
   Azione co-op di nuova generazione dai creatori di Half-Life, Portal, Team Fortress e Counter-Strike.
   Oltre 20 nuovi oggetti e armi, in particolare oltre 10 armi da mischia (tra cui ascia, motosega, padella, mazza da baseball), per permetterti di scontrarti corpo a corpo con gli zombi.
   Nuovi Sopravvissuti. Nuova trama. Nuovi dialoghi. 
   Cinque ampie campagne in modalità co-op, Avversari e Sopravvivenza.
   Una nuovissima modalità multigiocatore.
   Infetti comuni non comuni. Ognuna delle cinque nuove campagne presenta almeno un nuovo zombi comune non comune esclusivo per ciascuna campagna. 
   IA Director 2.0. Una nuova tecnologia avanzata, chiamata IA Director, dirigeva il gameplay unico di L4D, personalizzando i nemici presenti, gli effetti e la musica in base alle prestazioni dei giocatori. L4D2 è controllato dall'IA Director 2.0, che è in grado di personalizzare ancora di più la struttura dei livelli, gli oggetti di gioco, il meteo e la luminosità per riflettere i diversi momenti della giornata.
   Statistiche, classifiche e un sistema di ricompense incoraggiano uno stile gioco collaborativo.

以僵屍末日為遊戲背景：《惡靈勢力 2》（L4D2）是 2008 年獲獎無數的第一名合作遊戲《惡靈勢力》的高度期待續作。
這款恐怖的第一人稱合作射擊遊戲，將帶領您和您的朋友穿過城市、沼澤和美國南部的墓地，從沙凡那港市到紐奧良，沿途經過五章廣闊的戰役。
您將從四名全新倖存者中扮演其中的一位，並裝備一系列火力強大的經典武器與升級武器。除了槍支之外，您還有機會用不同的屠殺近戰武器幹掉感染者，例如鏈鋸、斧頭，甚至致命的平底鍋。
您將試著使用這些武器（或在對抗模式中）對付三種恐怖且令人敬畏的全新特殊感染者。您也會遭遇五種新的「不尋常」普通感染者，包括可怕的泥人。
幫助惡靈勢力呈現手忙腳亂，豐富有趣的遊戲體驗往下一代邁進，就是人工智慧導演系統 2.0。升級版的導演系統能程序化地改變沿途天氣與您行走的路徑，還可以根據您的遊戲表現調整敵人的數量、效果和音效。《惡靈勢力 2》保證讓您每次遊戲都能有一個令人滿意，獨一無二的遊戲體驗，符合您遊戲的風格。

來自戰慄時空、傳送門、絕地要塞和絕對武力製作者的下一代團隊動作遊戲。

多達 20 種新武器和物品，多達 10 種近戰武器 - 斧頭、鏈鋸、平底鍋、球棒 - 讓您和僵屍近距離廝殺。

全新倖存者。全新故事。全新對話。

五章廣闊的戰役，可於合作、對抗和生存模式中進行遊戲。

一個新的多人遊戲模式。

不尋常普通感染者。五大章新戰役的每一章，至少包含一種該關卡專屬的「不尋常」普通感染者。

人工智慧導演系統 2.0：先進技術與「人工智慧導演」功能，讓惡靈勢力有獨一無二的遊戲體驗 - 基於玩家遊戲表現自訂敵人數量、效果和音樂。《惡靈勢力 2》以「人工智慧導演系統 2.0」為特色，擴充導演系統的能力以自訂化關卡路線配置、遊戲世界的物品、天氣和光源以反映一天中的不同時間。

統計、排名、和獎勵系統促使玩家們協力合作進行遊戲。

2008年在北美地区大受好评的《求生之路》，其续作《求生之路2》中有大量新要素增加。游戏不仅会引入一系列全新的主人公，而且在武器方面会增加用于近战的格斗型武器以进一步丰富游戏性。

brief: Left 4 Dead 2 is a cooperative first-person shooter video game, the sequel to Valve Corporation's Left 4 Dead. The Game builds upon cooperatively focused gameplay and Valve's proprietary Source engine, the same game engine used in the original Left 4 Dead. Set during the aftermath of an apocalyptic pandemic, Left 4 Dead 2 focuses on four new Survivors, fighting against hordes of the Infected, who develop severe psychosis and exhibit zombie-like tendencies. The Survivors must fight their way through five campaigns, interspersed with safe houses that act as checkpoints, with the goal of escape at each campaign's finale.

title: Sea of Thieves
description: Sea of Thieves offers the essential pirate experience, from sailing and fighting to exploring and looting – everything you need to live the pirate life and become a legend in your own right. With no set roles, you have complete freedom to approach the world, and other players, however you choose.

localized_title.text: 盗贼之海 Sea of Thieves

localized_description.text: Sea of Thieves offers the essential pirate experience, from sailing and fighting to exploring and looting – everything you need to live the pirate life and become a legend in your own right. With no set roles, you have complete freedom to approach the world, and other players, however you choose.

¡La Liga de contrabandistas ha cruzado el Velo del Diablo! Estos malhechores tienen buen ojo para los placeres de la vida y las manos tan largas como para quitárselos a sus dueños delante de sus narices.
  
  Lo que se traen entre manos en Sea of Thieves es un secreto muy bien guardado, pero tienen trabajo para aquellos piratas que quieran ganarse un poco más de oro mientras se enfrentan a las tripulaciones rivales durante el trayecto. Si quieres ganarte un puesto entre los Contrabandistas, deberás empezar por buscar su guarida…  
  
Descubre el misterio  
  No es de extrañar que los Contrabandistas sean un grupo discreto, pero seguro que eres más que capaz de descubrir alguna pista sobre sus planes a lo largo y ancho de los mares. Tal vez un pirata curioso y que siempre esté alerta pueda descubrir lo que están tramando... 
  
Guarida de contrabandistas  
  Cuando trabajes clandestinamente, debes evitar que te vean por los puestos de avanzada. Los contactos de la Liga de contrabandistas se han instalado en guaridas escondidas por el mapa y protegidas por trampas ocultas que tendrás que evitar (o usar contra tus rivales) para garantizar una entrega segura.
  
Introducir contrabando 
  La Liga aún sigue acostumbrándose a la vida en el Sea of Thieves y necesitan que alguien les eche una mano con el transporte de sus mercancías. Las rutas de Contrabandistas están disponibles en Alta mar, pueden realizarse desde la mesa de misiones y tienen lugar en una ruta dorada que cambiará cada temporada. Esta ruta también está marcada en la mesa de mapas de otros barcos, lo que aumentará el reto de alcanzar el destino sin que la mercancía sufra ningún daño.
  Si encuentras un mensaje en una botella con una marca de contrabandista en otro lugar, también tendrás la oportunidad de participar en una salida de contrabandistas. Estas Travesías emergentes pueden proponer varias rutas con mercancías más exóticas, pero todas están centradas en transportar cargamentos lujosos y frágiles entre las guaridas de contrabandistas. 
  
Mercancía clandestina 
  La Liga de contrabandistas busca un botín que difiera de los típicos cofres del tesoro y calaveras. ¡Prefieren decantarse por el arte, el ron de primerísima calidad e incluso por los barriles de pólvora negra extremadamente potentes! Échales el guante y verás que tienes que tratarlos con cuidado: las botellas de ron se romperán si reciben daños y, aunque pueden resistir un poco más, los barriles de pólvora negra detonan con más fuerza que cualquier otro explosivo entre las olas.
  
Un mundo abierto en evolución 
  Las guaridas no son la única prueba de la llegada de la Liga. Esta temporada, los Naufragios de contrabandistas se pueden encontrar mientras surcas las olas e irán llenos de mercancía rara y valiosa que valdrá la pena rescatar. Algunas de estas mercancías ya han sido recogidas por barcos de esqueletos errantes y también se pueden encontrar objetos esparcidos por las costas, ¡a menos que otra tripulación más avispada se los quede antes!
  
Nuevas recompensas de temporada 
  ¡Una nueva temporada significa nuevos premios que desbloquear en los 100 niveles de renombre! Gana cosméticos, oro, doblones y hasta monedas antiguas aumentando tu rango y viviendo la auténtica vida pirata.
  
Acerca del juego  
Sea of Thieves ofrece la experiencia de piratas definitiva, desde la navegación y el combate hasta la exploración y el saqueo: todo para disfrutar de la vida pirata y convertirte en leyenda. No hay funciones establecidas, tienes total libertad para enfrentarte al mundo y a los demás jugadores como desees.

Tanto si navegas en grupo o en solitario, acabarás cruzándote con otras tripulaciones en esta aventura de mundo compartido..., pero ¿serán amigos o enemigos? ¿Cómo responderás?
     
Un enorme mundo abierto 
  Explora un vasto mundo abierto repleto de islas vírgenes y reinos submarinos. Afronta misiones en busca de botín perdido, forja una reputación con las compañías comerciales y lucha contra enemigos, desde fantasmas y rastreadores oceánicos, hasta megalodones o poderosos krakens. Prueba suerte pescando, traza mapas hasta tu propio tesoro enterrado o elige entre cientos de objetivos opcionales y misiones secundarias.
  
Un juego en constante crecimiento 
  Sea of Thieves es un juego basado en servicios que crece y evoluciona de forma constante, con cada temporada nueva repleta de funciones de juego cada tres meses y eventos regulares del juego. Consulta con frecuencia qué contenido gratuito se ha añadido y comprueba lo lejos que puedes llegar a lo largo de los 100 niveles de renombre de cada temporada para ganar recompensas especiales.
     
Conviértete en una leyenda 
  Durante tu travesía para convertirte en un pirata legendario, podrás amasar botines, granjearte un nombre y usar recompensas para diseñarte un estilo propio. Aventurero, explorador, conquistador... ¿Qué contará tu leyenda?

La Ligue des contrebandiers a traversé le Devil's Shroud ! Cette bande de mécréants a l'œil pour les biens de valeur, et bien sûr, des doigts agiles requis pour les subtiliser à leur propriétaire.
  La nature exacte de leurs activités à Sea of Thieves est un secret bien gardé, mais ils proposent du travail aux pirates qui cherchent à gagner un petit pécule tout en bataillant avec des équipages rivaux. Alors si vous souhaitez entrer en contact avec les contrebandiers, commencez par rechercher leurs repaires...
  
Percez le mystère 
  Sans surprise, les contrebandiers ne sont pas du genre bavard, mais vous parviendrez sûrement à trouver quelques indices sur leurs véritables projets en parcourant les mers. Avec un flair d'enquêteur et une bonne dose de perspicacité, vous pourriez bien percer à jour leurs machinations...
  
Repaires des contrebandiers 
  Quand on agit dans la clandestinité, on n'ouvre pas une échoppe sur les avant-postes. Les contacts des contrebandiers ont préféré s'installer dans des repaires secrets dispersés sur la carte, protégés par des pièges dissimulés qu'il vous faudra éviter (ou utiliser au détriment de vos rivaux) pour livrer votre cargaison.
  
Lancez-vous dans la contrebande 
  Tandis que la Ligue se familiarise avec la vie à Sea of Thieves, elle recherche de la main-d'œuvre pour transporter ses marchandises. Disponibles en mode Hautes mers, des missions de virée des contrebandiers vous attendent à la table des quêtes. Vous devrez suivre une route dorée dont le trajet sera modifié chaque saison. Cette route apparaît également sur les tables à carte des autres navires, vous compliquant la tâche pour atteindre votre destination en gardant intacte votre cargaison.
  Trouver une bouteille à la mer portant le sceau de la Ligue peut également lancer une mission de contrebandier. Ces voyages émergents proposent divers trajets et des marchandises encore plus exotiques, mais tous se résument à transporter des biens précieux et fragiles d'un repaire des contrebandiers à un autre.
  
Cargaison clandestine 
  À la place des traditionnels crânes et coffres au trésor, la Ligue des contrebandiers recherche du butin plus rare : œuvres d'art, rhum précieux, et même les dévastateurs barils de poudre noire ! Cependant, ce sont des marchandises à manier avec prudence. En effet, les bouteilles de rhum peuvent se briser en cas de choc, et les barils de poudre noire, s'ils sont plus résistants, peuvent produire une détonation plus puissante que n'importe quel autre explosif à Sea of Thieves.
  
Un monde en bac à sable en perpétuelle évolution 
  Les repaires ne sont pas les seules nouveautés accompagnant l'arrivée des contrebandiers. Cette saison, vous trouverez également des épaves des contrebandiers disséminées sous la surface. Elles regorgent de butin rare et précieux qui vaut bien le détour ! Des navires squelettes en maraude ont déjà fait main basse sur une partie du butin, et des objets échoués çà et là sur la rive attendent que vous les ramassiez, du moins si un autre équipage attentif ne les a pas repérés avant vous !
  
Nouvelles récompenses saisonnières 
  Qui dit nouvelle saison dit nouvelles récompenses, à déverrouiller via 100 niveaux de renommée. Obtenez des objets cosmétiques, de l'or, des doublons et même des pièces anciennes en grimpant les échelons.
  
À propos du jeu  
Sea of Thieves vous propose une aventure de pirate ultime avec un gameplay directement issu de l'imaginaire de la piraterie : de la navigation, de l'exploration et des chasses au trésor. Comme les rôles ne sont pas prédéfinis, vous pourrez contribuer à ce monde comme il vous plaira.
  
Que vous voguiez en solitaire ou à plusieurs, vous ferez la rencontre d'autres équipages. Mais seront-ils amis ou ennemis ? Et ferez-vous preuve de bienveillance ou serez-vous impitoyable ?

Un vaste monde ouvert 
  Explorez un vaste monde ouvert parsemé d'îles inexplorées et de royaumes sous-marins. Entreprenez des quêtes à la recherche de butin perdu, forgez-vous une réputation auprès des sociétés et affrontez des ennemis, des fantômes aux crabiers en passant par les mégalodons et le puissant kraken. Essayez la pêche, créez des cartes vers vos propres trésors enterrés ou choisissez un des objectifs optionnels qui se comptent par centaines !
     
   Un jeu en perpétuelle évolution 
  Avec chaque saison vous proposant de nouvelles fonctionnalités tous les trois mois, ainsi que des événements en jeu réguliers, Sea of Thieves est un jeu service en constante expansion et évolution. Revenez régulièrement pour voir le nouveau contenu ajouté ainsi que votre progression dans les 100 niveaux de renommée de chaque saison pour obtenir des récompenses spéciales.
     
   Devenez une légende 
  Au cours de votre épopée pour devenir une légende pirate, vous pourrez amasser du butin, vous forger une réputation et définir votre propre style grâce à des récompenses gagnées à la sueur de votre front. Aventurier. Explorateur. Conquérant. Quelle sera votre légende ?
《盗贼之海》是一款开放世界动作冒险游戏，由Rare开发，微软工作室发行，支持的平台包括Windows 10和Xbox One。玩家在游戏中可以像一个海盗一样航行，单人或者组织一个最多四人的小队进行游戏。游戏的特色在于多人合作和玩家对抗。游戏于2018年3月20日全球发行，评论家们的态度则是褒贬不一。

Die Schmuggler-Liga hat den Devil’s Shroud durchquert! Diese Halunken haben ein gutes Auge für die schönen Dinge des Lebens – und flinke Finger, um sie dem eigentlichen Besitzer vor der Nase wegzuschnappen.
  
  Was genau sie in der Sea of Thieves planen, ist ein gut gehütetes Geheimnis, aber sie haben stets Arbeit für Piraten, die sich etwas dazuverdienen wollen und dabei rivalisierende Crews aus dem Weg räumen. Wollt ihr also bei den Schmugglern anheuern, sucht als Erstes nach ihren Verstecken …
  
Lüftet das Geheimnis 
  Schmuggler sind bekanntlich ein verschwiegener Haufen, doch ihr findet auf den Meeren sicherlich einige Hinweise auf ihre Pläne. Ein scharfsichtiger, neugieriger Pirat könnte ihren Machenschaften sicher auf den Grund gehen …
  
Schmuggler-Verstecke 
  Wer abseits der Regeln agiert, wird sich nicht an den Außenposten blicken lassen. Die Kontaktpersonen der Schmuggler-Liga haben sich stattdessen in Verstecken überall auf der Karte niedergelassen, beschützt von Fallen, die ihr vermeiden solltet (oder direkt gegen eure Rivalen einsetzen könnt), um eine sichere Lieferung zu gewährleisten.
   
Schmuggelware 
  Die Liga muss sich noch an das Leben auf der Sea of Thieves gewöhnen und braucht daher Hilfe beim Transport ihrer Waren. Die Routenfahrten der Schmuggler sind auf dem Offenen Meer verfügbar und können am Missionstisch gestartet werden. Sie finden entlang einer goldenen Route statt, die jede Saison wechselt und auch auf den Kartentischen anderer Schiffe verzeichnet ist. Das Ziel mit intakter Fracht zu erreichen, ist also durchaus eine Herausforderung.
  Wer eine Schmuggler-Flaschenpost findet, kann auch eine Schmuggler-Fahrt starten. Diese auftauchenden Seefahrten bieten verschiedene Routen mit noch exotischerer Fracht, verlangen aber alle, wertvolle Waren von einem Schmuggler-Versteck zum nächsten zu transportieren.
  
Geheime Fracht 
  Die Schmuggler-Liga gibt sich nicht mit den üblichen Schatztruhen und Schädeln zufrieden. Es geht um seltene Beute, von Kunstwerken und hochwertigem Rum bis hin zu wirklich starken Schwarzpulverfässern! Diese Fracht müsst ihr äußerst sorgfältig behandeln. Rumflaschen zerbersten, wenn sie Schaden nehmen. Schwarzpulverfässer sind zwar etwas widerstandsfähiger, wenn sie jedoch zerstört werden, habt ihr auf eurem Schiff eine heftige Explosion.
  
Sandbox im Wandel 
  Nicht nur die Verstecke künden von der Ankunft der Liga. In dieser Saison könnt ihr überall Schiffswracks der Schmuggler entdecken, voller seltener Fracht, die einen Umweg wirklich wert ist. Umherziehende Skelettschiffe haben schon einen Teil der Ladung für sich beansprucht. Einige verstreute Gegenstände werden auch an den Stränden angespült – also, wer zuerst kommt …
  
Neue Saisonbelohnungen 
  Eine neue Saison bedeutet auch neue Belohnungen, die ihr durch das Aufsteigen in den 100 Stufen der Berühmtheit erhalten könnt! Verdient euch Anpassungen, Gold, Dublonen und sogar Antike Münzen, während ihr die Ränge durch Piratentaten erklimmt.
  
Infos zum Spiel  
Sea of Thieves bietet dir das Piratenerlebnis schlechthin. Vom Segeln und Kämpfen bis zu Erkundungen und Beutezügen findest du alles, was das Piratenherz begehrt. Ohne festgesteckte Rollen hast du die Freiheit, der Welt und anderen Spielern so zu begegnen, wie du es willst.
  
Ob du nun in einer Gruppe oder alleine in See stichst, begegnest du in diesem Shared-World-Abenteuer anderen Crews – doch werden sie dir feindlich oder freundlich gesinnt sein? Und wie wirst du reagieren?
  
Eine weitläufige offen Welt 
  Erkunde eine weitläufige offene Welt voller unberührter Inseln und Unterwasser-Reiche. Stell dich Missionen, um verschollene Beute zu finden, dein Ansehen bei den Handelskompanien aufzupolieren und gegen Feinde wie Phantome und Krabbenkrabbler, aber auch Megalodons und mächtige Kraken, zu bekämpfen. Versuche dich am Angeln, zeichne Karten zu deinem vergrabenen Schatz oder wähle aus hunderten anderer optionaler Ziele und Nebenmissionen!
  
Ein stetig wachsendes Spiel 
  Mit jeder Saison werden alle drei Monate neben regulären Events im Spiel auch neue Spielfunktionen eingeführt. Sea of Thieves ist ein Service-basiertes Spiel, das stetig weiter wächst und sich weiterentwickelt. Schau regelmäßig vorbei, um zu sehen, welche kostenlosen Inhalte neu hinzugefügt wurden, und finde dann heraus, wie weit du in den 100 saisonalen Stufen der Berühmtheit aufsteigen kannst, um spezielle Belohnungen zu erhalten.
  
Werde zur Legende 
  Auf deinem Weg, eine Piratenlegende zu werden, wirst du so manchen Schatz plündern, dir deinen eigenen Ruf erarbeiten und deinen ganz eigenen Stil im Umgang mit deinen hart erarbeiteten Schätzen finden müssen. Abenteurer. Entdecker. Eroberer. Welche Art von Piratenlegende wirst du sein?

La Lega dei Contrabbandieri ha attraversato il Devil's Shroud! Quest'orda di criminali ha fiuto per le cose belle della vita e, naturalmente, la mano lesta per sottrarle da sotto il naso dei legittimi proprietari.
  
  La vera natura dei loro affari nel Sea of Thieves è un segreto ben custodito, ma hanno incarichi per quei pirati che vogliono guadagnare un po' d'oro in più affrontando ciurme rivali sul loro tragitto. Quindi, se hai intenzione di cimentarti in questa impresa con i Contrabbandieri, comincia a cercare i loro nascondigli...   
  
Svela il mistero  
  I Contrabbandieri, come prevedibile, hanno la bocca cucita, ma di certo da qualche parte nei mari si possono scovare indizi sui loro piani. Forse un pirata dall'occhio attento e dallo spirito curioso riuscirà a svelare i loro intrighi... 
  
I rifugi dei Contrabbandieri  
  Quando agisci nell’ombra, è meglio non farsi beccare negli avamposti. I contatti della Lega dei contrabbandieri, invece, si sono stabiliti nei rifugi nascosti su tutta la mappa, protetti da trappole nascoste che dovrai aggirare (o usare a tuo vantaggio contro i rivali) per garantire una consegna sicura.
  
Contrabbando di merci 
  La Lega deve ancora abituarsi alla vita nei mari di Sea of Thieves, per cui ha bisogno di una mano per consegnare la merce nel posto giusto.  Disponibili in alto mare, le Scorribande sulla rotta dei Contrabbandieri si possono accettare dal Tavolo delle missioni e si svolgono lungo un tragitto dorato che cambia ogni stagione: un percorso segnato anche sul Tavolo della mappa delle altre navi, rendendo più arduo portare il carico a destinazione sano e salvo.
  
Se da qualche parte trovi un messaggio in bottiglia contrassegnato dai Contrabbandieri, avrai l'opportunità di affrontare un Traffico dei Contrabbandieri. Questi viaggi emergenti propongono diverse rotte con merci ancor più esotiche, ma hanno come obiettivo il trasporto furtivo di merci fragili e preziose da un rifugio dei contrabbandieri a un altro. 
  
Merci clandestine 
  Al posto dei soliti forzieri e teschi, la Lega dei contrabbandieri cerca bottini più rari, che vanno da opere d’arte e rum pregiato fino a potenti barili di polvere nera! Metti le mani su questi bottini, ma dovrai maneggiarli con cura: le bottiglie di rum si romperanno se danneggiate, e anche se i barili di polvere nera possono reggere qualche colpo, la loro esplosione è più potente di qualsiasi altro ordigno presente sui mari.
  
Un ambiente in evoluzione 
  I rifugi non sono l'unico segnale dell'arrivo della Lega. I relitti dei contrabbandieri punteggiano i mari in questa stagione, carichi di merci rare e ambite, che valgono una deviazione per essere recuperate. Le navi degli scheletri erranti sono già pronte a reclamare parte di queste merci, mentre alcuni oggetti sparsi possono anche essere trovati arenati sulle coste, a meno che un altro equipaggio dall'occhio attento non li trovi prima!

Nuove ricompense stagionali 
  Ogni stagione porta con sé una nuova serie di ricompense, che possono essere sbloccate avanzando tra i 100 livelli di fama! Ottieni oggetti cosmetici, oro, dobloni e perfino monete antiche mentre scali i ranghi vivendo da vero pirata.
  
      Informazioni sul gioco  
Sea of Thieves ti coinvolge in un'esperienza piratesca totale, dalla navigazione ai combattimenti, fino all'esplorazione e ai saccheggi: vivi da filibustiere ed entra di diritto nella leggenda. Senza ruoli prestabiliti, disponi della libertà più totale per affrontare il mondo e gli altri giocatori nel modo che preferisci.
  
Avventurati in gruppo o in solitaria e incontra altre ciurme di pirati in questo mondo condiviso... Saranno amichevoli oppure ostili? E tu come reagirai?
  
Un vasto mondo aperto 
  Esplora un vasto mondo aperto, ricco di isole incontaminate e regni sottomarini. Vai alla ricerca di tesori perduti, fatti una reputazione con le Compagnie di commercio e affronta svariati nemici, dai fantasmi e i lombrichi oceanici fino ai megalodonti e persino il possente kraken. Mettiti alla prova nella pesca, segui le mappe fino ai tesori sepolti o scegli tra centinaia di obiettivi e missioni secondarie opzionali.

Un gioco che cresce continuamente 
  Proponendo ogni tre mesi una diversa stagione con nuove funzionalità, oltre agli eventi di gioco regolari, Sea of Thieves è un gioco e un servizio in continua crescita ed evoluzione. Torna regolarmente per scoprire quali nuovi contenuti gratuiti sono stati aggiunti e vedere fin dove riesci a spingerti nella scalata dei 100 livelli di Fama stagionali che ti offrono ricompense speciali.

   Diventa una Leggenda 
  Nel tuo viaggio per diventare una Leggenda pirata deprederai bottini, ti costruirai una reputazione e svilupperai uno stile personale e inconfondibile con ricompense ottenute duramente. Avventuriero. Esploratore. Conquistatore. Come entrerai nella leggenda?

brief: Sea of Thieves offers the essential pirate experience, from sailing and fighting to exploring and looting – everything you need to live the pirate life and become a legend in your own right. With no set roles, you have complete freedom to approach the world, and other players, however you choose.

title: Rhythm Heaven Megamix
description: Test your rhythm by chopping wood, sticking speeding viruses with forks and playing badminton while flying an airplane, all in time to catchy tunes in this deceptively challenging rhythm game. The accessible controls and catchy music, combined with the new visual feedback system, make this a great entry in the Rhythm Paradise series. Can you match the beat and reach Rhythm Paradise ?

title: Duck Detective: The Secret Salami
description: Solving crime is no walk in the pond. You are a down-on-his-luck detective who also happens to be a duck. Use your powers of de-duck-tion to inspect evidence, fill in the blanks, and bust the case wide open, in a narrative mystery adventure where nothing is quite as it seems.

title: Portal
description: Waking up in a seemingly empty laboratory, the player is made to complete various physics-based puzzle challenges through numerous test chambers in order to test out the new Aperture Science Handheld Portal Device, without an explanation as to how, why or by whom.

localized_description.text: Waking up in a seemingly empty laboratory, the player is made to complete various physics-based puzzle challenges through numerous test chambers in order to test out the new Aperture Science Handheld Portal Device, without an explanation as to how, why or by whom.
《传送门》（Portal）是一款由Valve所开发的第一人称射击/解谜游戏，于2007年与半条命2三部曲（HL2、HL2EP1、HL2EP2)《军团要塞2》游戏一起捆绑于橙盒(The Orange Box)上市，另外也有Xbox 360以及PS3的版本。游戏使用Source引擎。游戏的特色是不寻常的逻辑思考部份，玩家必须解决一些棘手及有趣的逻辑问题才能得到过关的方法

Waking up in a seemingly empty laboratory, the player is made to complete various physics-based puzzle challenges through numerous test chambers in order to test out the new Aperture Science Handheld Portal Device, without an explanation as to how, why or by whom.

Portal's plot is revealed to the player via audio messages or "announcements" from GLaDOS and visual elements inside rooms found in later levels. According to The Final Hours of Portal 2, the year is established to be "somewhere in 2010"—twelve years after Aperture Science has been abandoned.

The game begins with Chell waking up from a stasis bed and hearing instructions and warnings from GLaDOS, an artificial intelligence, about upcoming tests. Chell enters into distinct chambers that introduce players to the game's mechanics, sequentially. GLaDOS's announcements serve as instructions to Chell and help the player progress through the game, but also develops the atmosphere and characterizes the AI as a person.[4] Chell is promised cake as her reward if she completes all test chambers.[19]

Chell proceeds through the empty Enrichment Center, with GLaDOS as her only interaction. As the player nears completion, GLaDOS's motives and behavior turn more sinister; although she is designed to appear encouraging, GLaDOS's actions and speech suggest insincerity and callous disregard for the safety and well-being of the test subjects. The test chambers become increasingly dangerous as Chell proceeds, tests including a live-fire course designed for military androids, as well as some chambers flooded with a hazardous liquid. In another chamber, GLaDOS notes the importance of the Weighted Companion Cube, a waist-high crate with a single large pink heart on each face, for helping Chell to complete the test. However, GLaDOS declares it must be euthanized in an "emergency intelligence incinerator" before Chell can continue.[17] Some later chambers include automated turrets with childlike voices (also voiced by McLain) that fire at Chell, only to sympathize with her after being destroyed or disabled.[20][21]

After Chell completes the final test chamber, GLaDOS maneuvers Chell into an incinerator in an attempt to kill her. Chell escapes with the portal gun and makes her way through the maintenance areas within the Enrichment Center.[22] GLaDOS panics and insists that she was pretending to kill Chell as part of testing. GLaDOS then asks Chell to assume the "party escort submission position", lying face-first on the ground, so that a "party associate" can take her to her reward, but Chell continues her escape. In this section, GLaDOS communes with Chell as it becomes clear the AI had killed everyone else in the center.[11][12] Chell makes her way through the maintenance areas and empty office spaces behind the chambers, sometimes following graffiti messages which point in the right direction. These backstage areas, which are in an extremely dilapidated state, stand in stark contrast to the pristine test chambers. The graffiti includes statements such as "the cake is a lie", and pastiches of Emily Dickinson's poem "The Chariot", Henry Wadsworth Longfellow's "The Reaper and the Flowers", and Emily Brontë's "No Coward Soul Is Mine", referring to and mourning the death of the Companion Cube.[4]

GLaDOS attempts to dissuade Chell with threats of physical harm and misleading statements as Chell makes her way deeper into the maintenance areas. Chell reaches a large chamber where GLaDOS's hardware hangs overhead. GLaDOS continues to threaten Chell, but during the exchange, a sphere falls off of GLaDOS and Chell drops it in an incinerator. GLaDOS reveals that Chell has just destroyed the morality core or her conscience, one of the multiple "personality cores" that Aperture Science employees installed after the AI flooded the enrichment center with neurotoxin gas. With it removed, she can access its emitters again. A six-minute countdown starts as Chell dislodges and incinerates more of GLaDOS' personality cores, while GLaDOS discourages her both verbally, with taunts and juvenile insults, and physically by firing rockets at her. After Chell destroys the last personality core, a malfunction tears the room apart and transports everything to the surface. Chell is then seen lying outside the facility's gates amid the remains of GLaDOS. Following the announcement of Portal 2, the ending was expanded in a later update. In this retroactive continuity, Chell is dragged away from the scene by an unseen entity speaking in a robotic voice, thanking her for assuming the "party escort submission position".[15][23]

The final scene, after a long and speedy zoom through the bowels of the facility, shows a Black Forest cake,[24] and the Weighted Companion Cube, surrounded by a mix of shelves containing dozens of apparently inactive personality cores. The cores begin to light up, before a robotic arm descends and extinguishes the candle on the cake, causing the room to blackout.[25] As the credits roll, GLaDOS delivers a concluding report: the song "Still Alive", which declares the experiment to be a huge success, as well as serving to indicate to the player that GLaDOS is still alive,[26] that her "happy" core was not disabled.

Portal™ is a new single player game from Valve. Set in the mysterious Aperture Science Laboratories, Portal has been called one of the most innovative new games on the horizon and will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay.
 
					The game is designed to change the way players approach, manipulate, and surmise the possibilities in a given environment; similar to how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun innovated new ways to leverage an object in any given situation.
 
					Players must solve physical puzzles and challenges by opening portals to maneuvering objects, and themselves, through space.

Portal™ es la nueva aventura para un solo jugador de Valve. Ambientado en los misteriosos laboratorios de Aperture Science, Portal ha sido calificado como uno de los juegos más innovadores de los últimos tiempos y ofrece incontables horas de rompecabezas nunca vistos.
 

 
					El juego está diseñado para cambiar radicalmente el modo en que los jugadores enfocan, sopesan y reaccionan a las circunstancias en un entorno determinado, al igual que la pistola antigravedad abrió un nuevo mundo de posibilidades a la hora de manipular objetos.
 

 
					Los jugadores deben resolver rompecabezas y desafíos basados en las leyes físicas abriendo portales y desplazando objetos, o incluso sus propios avatares, a través del espacio.

Portal™ est un nouveau jeu solo signé Valve. Avec pour décor les mystérieux laboratoires Aperture Science, Portal s'impose par son côté innovant et garantit aux joueurs un gameplay et une longévité à toute épreuve.
 

 
					Le jeu a été conçu pour amener les joueurs à repenser la façon dont ils abordent et envisagent les possibilités d'un environnement donné, un peu comme le pistolet anti-gravité de Half-Life® 2 avait en son temps innové en proposant de nouvelles manières de tirer parti d'un objet dans une situation précise.
 

 
					Le joueur doit résoudre des énigmes et relever différents défis en ouvrant des portails afin de manipuler des objets et de se déplacer lui-même dans l'espace.

Portal™ ist ein neues Valve-Spiel im Einzelspielermodus. Portal, dessen Handlung in den geheimnisvollen Aperture Science Laboratories spielt, gilt als eines der innovativsten Spiele überhaupt und bietet Spielern viele Stunden voller einzigartiger Spielunterhaltung.
 
Die Spieler dieses Spiels können die Möglichkeiten einer gegebenen Umgebung auf eine völlig neue Weise ausschöpfen, so wie das Gravitron in Half-Life® 2 neue Möglichkeiten der Nutzung eines Objekts in verschiedenen Situationen bietet.
 
Die Spieler müssen mit zwei Portalen Rätsel lösen, sich Herausforderungen stellen und auf diese Weise verschiedene Objekte – und sich selbst – bewegen.

O Portal™ é um novo jogo da Valve para um jogador. Passado nos misteriosos Laboratórios Aperture Science, Portal é considerado um dos jogos mais inovadores do horizonte e irá proporcionar aos jogadores horas de jogo sem igual.
 

 
O jogo foi concebido para alterar a forma como os jogadores abordam, manipulam e avaliam as possibilidades num dado ambiente; comparável à forma como a Arma Antigravidade do Half-Life 2 inovou as possibilidades de tirar partido de um objeto em qualquer situação.
 

 
Os jogadores têm de resolver quebra-cabeças físicos e desafios abrindo portais para manobrar objetos, e a si próprios, pelo espaço.

Portal™ er et nyt singleplayer-spil fra Valve. Portal, der udspiller sig i det mystiske Aperture Science Laboratories, er blevet kaldt et af de mest innovative nye spil i vente og vil byde gamere på mange timers unikt gameplay.
 

 
Spillet er designet til at ændre den måde, hvorpå spillere tackler, manipulerer og gisner om mulighederne i et givent område - i stil med, hvordan Half-Life® 2's Tyngdekraftvåben skabte nye måder at udnytte objekter på i en given situation.
 

 
Spillere skal løse fysiske gåder og udfordringer ved at åbne portaler, som tillader dem at teleportere både objekter og sig selv gennem et rum.

Portal™ è un nuovo gioco per giocatore singolo di Valve. Ambientato nei misteriosi laboratori di Aperture Science, Portal è stato giudicato uno dei titoli più innovativi del momento e offre ore di giocabilità unica.
 

 
					Il gioco è progettato per modificare le modalità di approccio, manipolazione e analisi delle possibilità all'interno di un dato ambiente, proprio come la pistola gravitazionale di Half-Life® 2 ha innovato i modi di sfruttare gli oggetti in ogni situazione.
 

 
					I giocatori devono risolvere rompicapo fisici aprendo portali, in modo da trasportare nello spazio se stessi o altri oggetti.

《传送门》是一款由Valve所开发的第一人称平台解谜游戏，于2007年10月9日与《半条命2：第二章》、《军团要塞2》等游戏一起装置于《橙盒》游戏包上市，可以在Windows、Xbox 360与PlayStation 3三种平台上运行。除了购买《橙盒》外，玩家也可以透过Steam在线服务购买该游戏，或是在2008年4月9日后直接购买该游戏的独立零售版本。2008年10月22日，一个名为《传送门：仍然活着》（英语：Portal: Still Alive）的独立版本在Xbox Live Arcade中发布。在2010年5月12日，Valve成功将Steam平台移植到Mac OS X，并且将该游戏移植到Mac OS X。2013年Valve将游戏移植到Linux系统中，5月2日发布beta版，7月24日发布正式版本。2014年5月12日，发布基于Nvidia Shield解决方案的Android版本。

该游戏以一连串的解谜难关组成，玩家必须利用手中的“光圈科学手持传送门装置”（简称为传送枪）打造传送门，为自己开条到出口的路。该游戏只有两个人物，一个是主角，名为雪儿（英语：Chell），另一个是名为GLaDOS（Generic Lifeform and Disk Operating System，通用生命体与磁盘操作系统）的人工智能。游戏内的难关全部由GLaDOS所设置。GLaDOS宣称，只要主角能解开所有的谜团（“完成测试”），就可以获得蛋糕。该游戏的创作概念源自一群迪吉彭理工学院学生开发的解谜游戏《Narbacular Drop》，后来这些学生被维尔福雇用，而《传送门》就是他们日后的创作结晶。

虽然该游戏的剧情长度很短，但该游戏依然被认为是2007年最出色的游戏之一。该游戏独特的玩法以及黑色幽默的剧情普遍获得评论家赞赏，另外很多评论家也特别赞赏游戏对于GLaDOS的角色塑造与片尾曲《仍然活着(Still Alive)》。由于该游戏很受到玩家的欢迎，维尔福也推出一系列的相关商品，许多玩家也自制游戏内的蛋糕与相关物品。

续作《传送门2》已于2011年4月18日推出。

brief: Waking up in a seemingly empty laboratory, the player is made to complete various physics-based puzzle challenges through numerous test chambers in order to test out the new Aperture Science Handheld Portal Device, without an explanation as to how, why or by whom.

title: A Short Hike
description:
Hike, climb, and soar through the peaceful mountainside landscapes of Hawk Peak Provincial Park as you make your way to the summit.

The main character is Claire, a young anthropomorphic bird who travels to Hawk Peak Provincial Park, where her Aunt May works as a ranger, to spend days off. However, Claire cannot get cellphone reception unless she reaches the top of the peak, and is expecting an important call. For this reason, she decides to reach the highest point in the park.

Hike, climb, and soar through the peaceful mountainside landscapes of Hawk Peak Provincial Park. Follow the marked trails or explore the backcountry as you make your way to the summit. Along the way, meet other hikers, discover hidden treasures, and take in the world around you.
 
        Key Features   Explore the island any way you like. Choose your own path to follow and see where it leads you. You never know what you might stumble into!
   Hike at your own pace — there’s no need to rush to the summit! Take your time fishing along the river banks or swimming by the lakeshore.
   Collect hidden treasures to reach new heights. Try taking a dive off the mountain peaks to soar above the forests.
   Chat with the other hikers you meet along your route. You might be able to help each other out!
   Listen to a lush original soundtrack by Mark Sparling that progresses dynamically as you explore the wilderness.

Trepa, camina, y vuela a través de los tranquilos paisajes de la montaña del Parque Provincial Picohalcón. Sigue los senderos marcados o explora la naturaleza en tu camino a la cumbre. En el camino, conoce a otros excursionistas, descubre tesoros ocultos, y respira el mundo a su alrededor. Características clave   Explora la isla como quieras. Elige tu propio camino a seguir y ve a dónde te lleva. ¡Nunca sabes con qué te puedes tropezar!
   Camina a tu propio ritmo, ¡no hay necesidad de apresurarte a la cumbre! Tómate tu tiempo pescando a lo largo de las orillas del río o nadando a orillas del lago.
   Recoge tesoros ocultos para alcanzar nuevas alturas. Trata de zambullirte en los picos de las montañas para elevarte por encima de los bosques.
   Chatea con los otros excursionistas que conozcas a lo largo de tu ruta. ¡Podrían ayudarse unos a otros!
   Escucha una exuberante banda sonora original de Mark Sparling que progresa dinámicamente mientras exploras el desierto.

Randonnez, escaladez, et planez dans le Parc provincial de Hawk Peak, et découvrez ses paysages paisibles. Suivez les sentiers balisés pour atteindre le sommet, ou explorez le parc comme vous le voulez. En chemin, vous ferez la connaissance d'autres randonneurs, découvrirez des trésors cachés, et profiterez de la nature environnante. Principales caractéristiques   Explorez l'île comme vous le sentez. Suivez votre intuition, et voyez où ça vous mène. Qui sait ce que vous découvrirez !
   Allez-y à votre rythme : pas besoin de vous précipiter jusqu'au sommet ! Prenez le temps de pêcher dans les rivières, ou de piquer une tête dans le lac.
   Collectionnez les trésors cachés pour prendre de la hauteur. Essayez de plonger depuis le sommet pour planer au-dessus des forêts.
   Discutez avec les autres randonneurs que vous rencontrerez en chemin. Vous pourrez peut-être vous aider les uns les autres !
   Laissez-vous emporter par une superbe bande originale composée par Mark Sparling, qui progresse au fur et à mesure que vous explorez cette île sauvage.

徒步，攀登，翱翔在Hawk Peak公园宁静的山腰景观中。 当您前往山顶时，沿着标记的小径或探索未知地区。 一路上，遇见其他徒步旅行者，发现隐藏的宝藏，观赏你周围的世界。

title: Tomb Raider
description:
Tomb Raider explores the intense and gritty origin story of Lara Croft and her ascent from a young woman to a hardened survivor. Armed only with raw instincts and the ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance, Lara must fight to unravel the dark history of a forgotten island to escape its relentless hold.

he game begins with Lara setting out on her first expedition aboard the ship Endurance, with the intention of finding the lost kingdom of Yamatai. By her suggestion and against Whitman's advice, the expedition ventures into the Dragon's Triangle, east of Japan. The ship is struck by a violent storm and shipwrecked, leaving the survivors stranded on an isolated island. Lara is separated from the others and captured by a strange, savage man. She manages to escape while her captor is killed as the cave collapses due to her actions. As Lara tries to locate the other survivors, she finds more evidence that the island is inhabited, such as strange carvings, dead bodies, and animal sacrifices. She eventually finds her friend Sam and a man called Mathias, who claims to be a teacher who was shipwrecked on the island. As Sam tells Mathias the legends of Himiko, Lara passes out; when she wakes, Mathias and Sam are nowhere in sight. When Lara regroups with the other survivors, Whitman decides to go with Lara and search for the still-missing Roth, while the rest of the group (Reyes, Jonah, Alex and Grim) set out to find Sam and Mathias. As Lara and Whitman explore, they discover that the island's inhabitants are worshipping Himiko, confirming that the island is Yamatai. Upon discovering a shrine erected in Himiko's name, they are captured by the islanders and taken to a settlement along with several other survivors from the Endurance. When the survivors attempt an escape, the captors turn on them. Lara is separated from Whitman and tries to hide, but is found by one of the islanders and forced to kill him. She fights off the remainder of the attackers and reunites with Roth, saving him from a wolf attack.

Lara manages to activate a radio tower and call for help, but the plane that answers the call is struck by a freak storm, and Lara hears a mysterious voice saying "No one leaves" in Japanese. Unable to save the surviving pilots, Lara is contacted by Alex and Reyes, who reveal that Sam has been kidnapped by the islanders, a violent cult known as the Solarii Brotherhood. Lara tries to rescue her, but is stopped by Mathias, leader of the Solarii, and ordered killed: she is saved by an attack from samurai-like Oni. Escaping the ancient monastery where she is taken by the Oni, she hears from Sam that Mathias is going to put her through the "Ascension", a "fire ritual" to find the next Sun Queen that will burn her to death if it is unsuccessful. Lara follows them to the Solarii fortress and is aided by Grim. The Solarii take Grim hostage, but he sacrifices himself so Lara can escape. With Roth's aid, Lara infiltrates the fortress and sees the ritual begin. When the fires are lit, a great wind blows them out, showing Sam to be the next Sun Queen. Lara escapes again and reunites with her friends, forming a plan to rescue Sam and escape. Aided by Whitman—who has managed to negotiate some degree of freedom with the Solarii—Lara returns to the palace to rescue Sam as Roth commandeers a helicopter to get them out. Lara succeeds, but persuades Sam to escape by land when she sees another storm gathering as the helicopter approaches. As Lara tries to force the helicopter pilot to land, they are brought down, with Lara nearly dying. Roth revives Lara, then takes a fatal blow from Mathias meant for Lara. While mourning Roth, Lara accepts that the storms are not natural, but are somehow connected to the Sun Queen and designed to prevent anyone from leaving the island. She meets up with the other survivors, who have evaded the Solarii long enough to secure a boat for escaping the island, provided that it can be repaired. They are joined by Whitman, who claims to have escaped, though Lara begins to suspect him of working with the cultists. Lara and Alex find parts for the boat in the wreck of the Endurance. They come under attack by the Solarii and Alex triggers an explosion, sacrificing himself so that Lara can escape with the tools.

Finding an account of a World War II-era Japanese military and Nazi scientific expedition to the island that sought a way to harness the storms as a weapon, Lara decides to explore a coastal tomb, where she finds the remains of a samurai general who committed seppuku. It is revealed in a message he left that he led the Queen's Stormguard, the Oni that defend the monastery, and that the Queen's successor took her own life rather than receive the Sun Queen's power. Lara realizes that the Ascension is not a ceremony to crown a new queen, but rather a ritual that transfers the original Sun Queen's soul into a new body; the Sun Queen had learned to become effectively immortal by transferring her soul into a young girl's body each time she grew old. The last priestess' suicide had interrupted the ritual, and left the Queen's soul trapped in her old decaying body, and Himiko's spirit has wanted to escape that corpse ever since. As a descendant of Yamatai, Sam is a viable candidate, and Mathias plans to offer Sam as a new host in exchange for his freedom. Lara returns to the survivors on the beach to find that Whitman has betrayed them, abducting Sam and handing her over to Mathias. Lara, Jonah and Reyes give chase, heading up a river to the monastery, with Lara arriving just in time to see Mathias trick Whitman into approaching and speaking to the Oni: the Oni kill Whitman. After fighting her way through both the Solarii and the Stormguard, Lara arrives at the top of the monastery where Mathias is performing the Ascension ritual. Lara fights her way to the central platform, and after a struggle, knocks Mathias off the platform to his death. Symbolically, she does so using both her pistol and his in a dual-wield style that will later become one of her signatures. Despite Mathias' death, the ritual is already underway, with Himiko's soul starting to pour into Sam, but Lara then destroys Himiko's ancient remains, saving Sam and dispersing the storms. Lara, Sam, Reyes and Jonah then leave the island and are picked up by a cargo ship: as they sail home, Lara realizes that the mythical stories her father told her were more than stories, deciding not to return home just yet, and the screen fades to white with a proclamation of "A Survivor is Born."

Symbolically, she does so using both her pistol and his in a dual-wield style that will later become one of her signatures. Despite Mathias' death, the ritual is already underway, with Himiko's soul starting to pour into Sam, but Lara then destroys Himiko's ancient remains, saving Sam and dispersing the storms. Lara, Sam, Reyes and Jonah then leave the island and are picked up by a cargo ship: as they sail home, Lara realizes that the mythical stories her father told her were more than stories, deciding not to return home just yet, and the screen fades to white with a proclamation of "A Survivor is Born."

  À propos du jeu       
 
 Tomb Raider est un jeu d'action-aventure acclamé par la critique, qui explore les origines mouvementées de Lara Croft et son évolution, de jeune femme à survivante endurcie. Armée seulement de son instinct et de sa capacité à repousser les limites de l'endurance humaine, Lara doit lutter pour dévoiler l'histoire sombre d'une île oubliée et échapper à son emprise implacable. L'édition Game of the Year inclut Tomb of the Lost Adventurer, 6 tenues pour Lara en jeu solo.

   Un tournant : vivez aux côtés de Lara son passage de jeune femme en apparence fragile à combattante aguerrie.

   Combattez pour survivre : récupérez des matériaux, gagnez de l'expérience, et assurez la survie de Lara en milieu hostile en améliorant ses armes et ses outils.
   Survivre ensemble : différents modes multijoueurs sont disponibles, dans lesquels vous pourrez incarner un membre de l'équipage de l'Endurance ou l'un des pilleurs de Yamatai.

 Das von der Kritik gefeierte Action-Adventure Tomb Raider erzählt die düstere und packende Vorgeschichte der Wandlung Lara Crofts von einer jungen Frau zur harten Überlebenskünstlerin. Nur mit ihrem Instinkt und übermenschlicher Ausdauer bewaffnet, deckt Lara die dunkle Vergangenheit einer vergessenen Insel auf, um ihrem gnadenlosen Griff zu entkommen. Die „Game of the Year“-Edition enthält „Das Grab des Abenteurers“, sechs Single Player-Outfits für Lara, 8 Multiplayer-Karten und 4 Charaktere.
 
  Infos zum Spiel       
 
 Tomb Raider ist ein erfolgreiches Action-Adventure, das die faszinierende Hintergrundgeschichte von Lara Croft ergründet und veranschaulicht, wie aus einer jungen Frau eine kampferprobte Überlebende wurde. Lara kann sich nur auf ihre Instinkte und ihre übermenschliche Ausdauer verlassen und muss die finstere Geschichte einer vergessenen Insel enthüllen, um sich aus ihrem eisernen Griff zu befreien. Die „Spiel des Jahres“-Ausgabe enthält „Das Grab des verschollenen Abenteurers“ und 6 Einzelspieler-Outfits für Lara.
 
  SCHLÜSSELELEMENTE: 
   Wendepunkt: Erlebe Lara Crofts aufregende Anfänge und ihre Entwicklung zur knallharten Überlebenskünstlerin.
   Völlig neue Erlebnisse auf Streifzügen: Erforsche eine mysteriöse Insel voll von Umgebungsrätseln, Kämpfen und Gräbern, die es zu entdecken gilt.
   Kämpfe, um zu überleben: Berge Ressourcen, sammle Erfahrung und verbessere Laras Waffen und Werkzeuge, um gegen die feindlich gesinnten Bewohner der Insel zu bestehen.
   Im Team überleben: Spiele in einer Vielzahl von Mehrspieler-Modi Laras Schiffskameraden oder Plünderer Yamatais.

  Tomb Raider Game of the Year Edition     
 Tomb Raider è un acclamato action-adventure che narra la storia appassionante di una giovane Lara Croft che da ragazza sprovveduta si trasforma in una temprata superstite. Affidandosi solo al suo istinto e a un'innata capacità di sopravvivenza, Lara deve combattere per svelare l'oscuro passato di un'isola dimenticata e sfuggire alla sua morsa micidiale. L’edizione Game of the Year include la Tomba dell’avventuriero, 6 completi per Lara, 8 mappe multigiocatore e 4 personaggi.
 
  Informazioni sul gioco       
 
 Tomb Raider è un'avventura d'azione acclamata dalla critica che approfondisce i lati più oscuri e drammatici del passato di Lara Croft, narrandone l'evoluzione da giovane donna a intrepida superstite. Armata soltanto del suo istinto e di una resistenza fuori dal comune, Lara si troverà a lottare per svelare i segreti oscuri di un'isola dimenticata che la tiene in trappola. L'edizione Game of the Year include Tomb of the Lost Adventurer e 6 tenute di Lara per giocatore singolo.
 
  CARATTERISTICHE: 
   Un punto di svolta: Vivi l'intensa storia delle origini di Lara Croft e assisti alla sua trasformazione da giovane donna a scaltra sopravvissuta.
   Una nuova esperienza: Esplora un'isola misteriosa, piena di puzzle ambientali, combattimenti coinvolgenti e antiche tombe da scoprire.
   Combatti per la vita: Raccogli materiali, ottieni esperienza e potenzia le armi di Lara per sopravvivere agli ostili abitanti dell'isola.
   Sopravvivi come un team: Gioca una varietà di modalità multiplayer nei panni dei compagni di Lara o degli sciacalli di Yamatai.

brief:
Tomb Raider explores the intense and gritty origin story of Lara Croft and her ascent from a young woman to a hardened survivor. Armed only with raw instincts and the ability to push beyond the limits of human endurance, Lara must fight to unravel the dark history of a forgotten island to escape its relentless hold.

he game begins with Lara setting out on her first expedition aboard the ship Endurance, with the intention of finding the lost kingdom of Yamatai. By her suggestion and against Whitman's advice, the expedition ventures into the Dragon's Triangle, east of Japan. The ship is struck by a violent storm and shipwrecked, leaving the survivors stranded on an isolated island. Lara is separated from the others and captured by a strange, savage man. She manages to escape while her captor is killed as the cave collapses due to her actions. As Lara tries to locate the other survivors, she finds more evidence that the island is inhabited, such as strange carvings, dead bodies, and animal sacrifices. She eventually finds her friend Sam and a man called Mathias, who claims to be a teacher who was shipwrecked on the island. As Sam tells Mathias the legends of Himiko, Lara passes out; when she wakes, Mathias and Sam are nowhere in sight. When Lara regroups with the other survivors, Whitman decides to go with Lara and search for the still-missing Roth, while the rest of the group (Reyes, Jonah, Alex and Grim) set out to find Sam and Mathias. As Lara and Whitman explore, they discover that the island's inhabitants are worshipping Himiko, confirming that the island is Yamatai. Upon discovering a shrine erected in Himiko's name, they are captured by the islanders and taken to a settlement along with several other survivors from the Endurance. When the survivors attempt an escape, the captors turn on them. Lara is separated from Whitman and tries to hide, but is found by one of the islanders and forced to kill him. She fights off the remainder of the attackers and reunites with Roth, saving him from a wolf attack.

Lara manages to activate a radio tower and call for help, but the plane that answers the call is struck by a freak storm, and Lara hears a mysterious voice saying "No one leaves" in Japanese. Unable to save the surviving pilots, Lara is contacted by Alex and Reyes, who reveal that Sam has been kidnapped by the islanders, a violent cult known as the Solarii Brotherhood. Lara tries to rescue her, but is stopped by Mathias, leader of the Solarii, and ordered killed: she is saved by an attack from samurai-like Oni. Escaping the ancient monastery where she is taken by the Oni, she hears from Sam that Mathias is going to put her through the "Ascension", a "fire ritual" to find the next Sun Queen that will burn her to death if it is unsuccessful. Lara follows them to the Solarii fortress and is aided by Grim. The Solarii take Grim hostage, but he sacrifices himself so Lara can escape. With Roth's aid, Lara infiltrates the fortress and sees the ritual begin. When the fires are lit, a great wind blows them out, showing Sam to be the next Sun Queen. Lara escapes again and reunites with her friends, forming a plan to rescue Sam and escape. Aided by Whitman—who has managed to negotiate some degree of freedom with the Solarii—Lara returns to the palace to rescue Sam as Roth commandeers a helicopter to get them out. Lara succeeds, but persuades Sam to escape by land when she sees another storm gathering as the helicopter approaches. As Lara tries to force the helicopter pilot to land, they are brought down, with Lara nearly dying. Roth revives Lara, then takes a fatal blow from Mathias meant for Lara. While mourning Roth, Lara accepts that the storms are not natural, but are somehow connected to the Sun Queen and designed to prevent anyone from leaving the island. She meets up with the other survivors, who have evaded the Solarii long enough to secure a boat for escaping the island, provided that it can be repaired. They are joined by Whitman, who claims to have escaped, though Lara begins to suspect him of working with the cultists. Lara and Alex find parts for the boat in the wreck of the Endurance. They come under attack by the Solarii and Alex triggers an explosion, sacrificing himself so that Lara can escape with the tools.

Finding an account of a World War II-era Japanese military and Nazi scientific expedition to the island that sought a way to harness the storms as a weapon, Lara decides to explore a coastal tomb, where she finds the remains of a samurai general who committed seppuku. It is revealed in a message he left that he led the Queen's Stormguard, the Oni that defend the monastery, and that the Queen's successor took her own life rather than receive the Sun Queen's power. Lara realizes that the Ascension is not a ceremony to crown a new queen, but rather a ritual that transfers the original Sun Queen's soul into a new body; the Sun Queen had learned to become effectively immortal by transferring her soul into a young girl's body each time she grew old. The last priestess' suicide had interrupted the ritual, and left the Queen's soul trapped in her old decaying body, and Himiko's spirit has wanted to escape that corpse ever since. As a descendant of Yamatai, Sam is a viable candidate, and Mathias plans to offer Sam as a new host in exchange for his freedom. Lara returns to the survivors on the beach to find that Whitman has betrayed them, abducting Sam and handing her over to Mathias. Lara, Jonah and Reyes give chase, heading up a river to the monastery, with Lara arriving just in time to see Mathias trick Whitman into approaching and speaking to the Oni: the Oni kill Whitman. After fighting her way through both the Solarii and the Stormguard, Lara arrives at the top of the monastery where Mathias is performing the Ascension ritual. Lara fights her way to the central platform, and after a struggle, knocks Mathias off the platform to his death. Symbolically, she does so using both her pistol and his in a dual-wield style that will later become one of her signatures. Despite Mathias' death, the ritual is already underway, with Himiko's soul starting to pour into Sam, but Lara then destroys Himiko's ancient remains, saving Sam and dispersing the storms. Lara, Sam, Reyes and Jonah then leave the island and are picked up by a cargo ship: as they sail home, Lara realizes that the mythical stories her father told her were more than stories, deciding not to return home just yet, and the screen fades to white with a proclamation of "A Survivor is Born."

title: PEAK
description:
PEAK is a co-op climbing game where the slightest mistake can spell your doom. Either solo or as a group of lost nature scouts, your only hope of rescue from a mysterious island is to scale the mountain at its center. Do you have what it takes to reach the PEAK?
     
WORK TOGETHER 
Need a Hand? You’ll need to rely on your friends to have any hope of scaling the mountain, which changes every single day. Help each other up ledges, or place ropes and climbing spikes to make the way easier for those who come after.
  
CLIMB 
The Mountain Takes no Prisoners! Climb through 4 biomes on your way to the PEAK, each with their own life-threatening obstacles. You’ll need to scavenge for questionable food to survive, and manage your injuries carefully — every setback limits your stamina, making it harder to climb.
  
SURVIVE 
Prepare For the Worst: Discover a variety of helpful survival items, from energy drinks to climbing spikes to the mysterious Anti-Rope. You’ve got no hope of making it to the PEAK unless you press every advantage given to you.
  
A NEW ISLAND EACH DAY 
The game's map rotates out every 24 hours! Try out the new layout each day, or give the same island multiple attempts in a day until you conquer it.
  
EARN BADGES 
A Well-Seasoned Scout: Show off your survival prowess with dozens of badges to earn and cosmetics to unlock.
  
CLIMBING IS BETTER WITH FRIENDS 
Multiplayer in PEAK is friends-only - invite up to three other scouts through Steam to climb together, or face the mountain alone if you're  really  brave!

FEATURES    
• Climb with a total of 4 friends
• Communicate through proximity chat       
• 4 different biomes to ascend through
• A bunch of questionable foods
• Lots of different climbing items
• Campfires and marshmallows   
• Character customization    
• Online co-op and offline single player    
• Ghosts
